description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with an L-shaped configuration, designed to accommodate multiple people comfortably. The sofa features a uniform, smooth gray upholstery that covers both the seat and backrest cushions, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The seat cushions are thick and plush, while the backrests are slightly angled for ergonomic support, all appearing to be attached rather than loose. The armrests are present only at the ends of the sectional, with a straight, boxy profile that matches the overall geometric design. The sofa is elevated on slender, black legs that are positioned at the corners and along the base for stability. Its minimalist design and neutral color make it suitable for urban environments such as public lounges, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A large, L-shaped modern sectional sofa with smooth gray upholstery, thick cushions, and slender black legs. Its minimalist design and neutral color make it ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shaped layout, seat and back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight armrest, and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the sofa's sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the long chaise section and the straight armrest at the end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six seat cushions and six backrest cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests present only at the ends of the sectional, matching the sofa's height and covered in the same upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Slender, black legs positioned at the corners and along the base, likely metal, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with attached cushions, no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
